overview: A fully accessible modern eCommerce platform with auto-generated product catalog, voice read-aloud, full accessibility panel (text size, contrast, dark mode, keyboard navigation), Internet Identity authentication, and shopping cart with smooth animations throughout.
features: Internet Identity login and signup with validation
24+ auto-generated products across 5 categories (voice devices, smart watches, accessible tech, fashion, gadgets)
Full accessibility panel: text size, high contrast, dark mode, voice narration, keyboard nav guide
Web Speech API read-aloud on product cards and detail pages
Responsive design with gradient backgrounds, rounded cards, and smooth animations
Product filtering by category and search, sortable by price/name
About, Contact, Accessibility guide, and Profile pages
